example: We **climb** the hill every Sunday morning.

This store sells sports **clothing**.
It's **cloudy** today. We can't see the sun.

Our school has many different **clubs**.
Put on your **coat**. It's cold outside.
The students hang their **coats** in the locker.
Please enter the **code** to open the door.
My father drinks a cup of **coffee** every morning.
I found a gold **coin** on the ground.
I have three **coins** in my pocket.
It's very **cold** in winter here.
She comes from **Colombia**.
The garden is full of **colorful** flowers.
What's your favourite **colour**?
The picture is very **colourful**.
I like bright **colours** like red and yellow.
The bus **comes** at 8 o'clock every morning.
This chair is very **comfortable** to sit on.
Spring is **coming** soon.
Use a **comma** to separate the items in the list.
English is a **common** language in the world.

Your answer is **correct**!
Please spell the words **correctly**.
